actions.action: When the user accesses the agent, the system automatically generates a short 'thought of the day' along with an auto greeting welcoming the user.
actions.fallback_action: If this action fails in the future, retry 3 times with short delays before proceeding with a default message.

recipe.steps: Generate an uplifting and concise 'thought of the day' for the user using the agent's language capabilities.
Generate a warm, spiritually-inclined greeting tailored to welcome the user.
Combine the 'thought of the day' and the greeting into a single message and deliver it to the user via TTS with a talking-head animation.
